all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And Elijah came unto all the people, and said, How long halt ye between two opinions? if the Lord be God, follow him: but if Baal, then follow him. And the people answered him not a word.
1 Kings 18:21
Quote of the Day
"Common consent is not a mere formality but a beautiful mix of our agency, unity, and faith."
Elder Patrick Kearon | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
